venus.title: Venus Lover
venus.desc: You love beautifully. Romantic, sensual, and devoted to the aesthetic of connection — you turn relationships into something cinematic.
venus.advice: Your romantic heart is a gift. But real love is messy too. Don't leave when the movie scene ends — the real story starts after.
youProbably: Remember what someone wore on your first date
Have a Love playlist that could make anyone cry
Fall for people who look like they belong in a painting
Write texts that read like poetry

mars.title: Mars Lover
mars.desc: You love fiercely. Passionate, direct, and allergic to lukewarm — you want a love that matches your intensity or nothing at all.
mars.advice: Your passion is intoxicating. But love isn't a battle to win. Sometimes the strongest move is softening.
youProbably: Said 'I love you' first and don't regret it
Need a partner who challenges you, not just agrees
Would rather fight than feel ignored

moon.title: Moon Lover
moon.desc: You love from the deepest place. Emotional, nurturing, and achingly sincere — you don't date, you merge souls.
moon.advice: Your depth is what makes love real. But you can't pour from an empty cup. Fill yours first — the right person will wait.
youProbably: Know your partner's moods better than they do
Create a home feeling wherever you go
Cry during the first dance at weddings
Have given someone a second chance you shouldn't have

jupiter.title: Jupiter Lover
jupiter.desc: You love wide open. Adventurous, optimistic, and endlessly curious — you need a love that grows with you, not one that holds you back.
jupiter.advice: Your freedom-loving heart is magnetic. But depth requires staying. The person who makes you want to stay? That's the one.
youProbably: Plan trips together before you're even official
Get restless in relationships that feel routine
Believe your soulmate exists — and you'll find them
Love harder when there's distance to cross
